meta.title: Rezics Products | Rezics
meta.description: Explore the Rezics product family: Library, Tags, Zone, Realm, Review, Wiki, Shelf, and Progress, all connected around story identity.

products.name: Rezics Library
products.summary: An open, cross-platform, multilingual metadata foundation for stories and works.
features: Preserve stories, works, aliases, sources, versions, languages, and relationships
Support web novels, born-digital books, interactive fiction, and hybrid works
Give reviews, wiki, tags, zones, and realms a shared identity

detail.heading: The public foundation for story identity
detail.lead: Rezics Library is where the system begins. It keeps stories from being locked inside one platform, language, or medium by giving them identities that can be cited, translated, expanded, and discussed.

sections.title: Work data should be completed by communities.
sections.body: Library keeps names, aliases, sources, versions, languages, related works, and media facts together so communities can contribute to one identity instead of rebuilding isolated entries.

sections.title: A story does not belong to the platform that published it.
sections.body: The same story may appear on an origin site, translation site, print edition, adaptation, or community archive. Library connects those entrances instead of letting them hide each other.

sections.title: Starting with web fiction, but not stopping at books.
sections.body: Interactive fiction, games, worlds, series, and hybrid creations need a more flexible identity model. Library is Rezics' base layer for every story form.

products.name: Rezics Tags
products.summary: Global tags plus realm-based votes, so classification can travel while keeping context.
features: Create a shared classification language across languages and communities
Use realm votes to handle ambiguity and local perspectives
Connect discovery, zones, shelves, reviews, and forum discussion through the same tagging base

detail.heading: Classification is not a platform's one-way answer
detail.lead: Rezics Tags connects global classification with community consensus. It does not force every community to mean the same thing by a tag; it lets realms express their own judgment.

sections.title: Global tags keep communities from becoming islands.
sections.body: When each community invents its own tags, discovery fragments. Rezics uses global tags as shared language across works, zones, shelves, and reviews.

sections.title: The same tag can have different community perspectives.
sections.body: Terms like hard sci-fi, harem, or backstage flow often carry disputes. Realm voting lets a community decide whether a tag fits a story from its own view.

sections.title: Good classification helps people find the stories they actually want.
sections.body: Tags influence zones, search, shelves, recommendation paths, and discussions. They serve encounter, not the tag list itself.

products.name: Rezics Zone
products.summary: A complete place for a story, world, series, theme, or genre inside Rezics.
features: Compose entrances from queries, tags, metadata, and realms
Carry wiki, structured knowledge, custom themes, and community spaces
Make libraries, genre hubs, story worlds, and topic pages part of one model

detail.heading: Everything is Zone
detail.lead: Rezics Zone is not a fixed category page. It is the complete place formed around a story, world, series, theme, or genre. Harry Potter can be a Zone. Fate can be a Zone. Hard sci-fi, interactive fiction, and light novels can be Zones too.

sections.title: A Zone can become the entrance to a story universe.
sections.body: A Zone can include works, wiki, structured knowledge, reviews, realm-based community, custom themes, and curated paths. People enter a place, not just an entry.

sections.title: Rezics does not need to hard-code every library.
sections.body: Older platforms split books, film, games, and software into separate worlds. Rezics builds zones from queries, tags, metadata, and realms, so it can be both universal and specialized.

sections.title: Zone lets knowledge and community grow together.
sections.body: When wiki, forums, tag consensus, and story identity gather in one Zone, it becomes public space for understanding, discussion, and continuation.

products.name: Rezics Realm
products.summary: Forum-grade communities built on global story identity and tags.
features: Make community a context, not a group that traps content
Build real forum structure on top of global tags and story identity
Support realm-specific classification, discussion, voting, and knowledge work

detail.heading: Build your forum
detail.lead: Rezics Realm is not another group. It is a forum-grade community built on global story identity, tags, and zones, so communities can form their own context without leaving the public network.

sections.title: Community should be context for understanding content.
sections.body: Group-based platforms often bury content in time. Realm connects community perspective back to works, tags, wiki, and reviews, so discussion returns to the story.

sections.title: Rezics aims to provide forums, not just chat groups.
sections.body: With global tags and story identity, Realm can organize boards, discussions, issues, votes, and knowledge entrances for long-term community memory.

sections.title: Different communities can keep different voices.
sections.body: Rezics respects every voice and lets communities understand stories in their own ways. Realm expresses difference instead of flattening it into one platform category.

products.name: Rezics Review
products.summary: Connect ratings, remarks, reviews, and discussion so evaluation has real value.
features: Separate rating, remark, and review as different layers of expression
Let reactions be discussed without reposting them elsewhere
Connect reviews to story identity, tags, realms, and zones

detail.heading: Evaluation should be more than a score
detail.lead: Rezics Review lets readers leave their voice beside the story. It can be a score, short remark, long essay, or discussion entrance that helps others understand whether and why to begin.

sections.title: After a story hits you, your reaction should not have to move away.
sections.body: Writing a review and then reposting it to Reddit or another forum just to discuss it is fragmentation. Rezics connects reviews directly to works and communities.

sections.title: Different forms of evaluation need different places.
sections.body: Ratings, remarks, and reviews carry different depth. Rezics lets light reactions and long analysis coexist without forcing them into one format.

sections.title: Good reviews create understanding, not only conclusions.
sections.body: Reviews can connect with tags, realm discussion, and wiki context, making evaluation part of how people understand a story.

products.name: Rezics Wiki
products.summary: A multilingual, openly editable knowledge system connected to stories, zones, realms, tags, and reviews.
features: Organize worlds, characters, timelines, settings, examples, and research
Keep wiki knowledge connected to story identity and community context
Support specialized knowledge entrances inside zones and realms

detail.heading: More than wiki
detail.lead: Rezics Wiki is not an isolated encyclopedia. It inherits wiki's open editing, then connects knowledge to stories, zones, realms, tags, reviews, and structured metadata.

sections.title: Knowledge can be organized by communities together.
sections.body: Worlds, timelines, character relations, setting explanations, and reading orders need long-term care. Rezics Wiki lets them be completed, corrected, and translated openly.

sections.title: Wiki should stay beside the stories that need it.
sections.body: Traditional wikis often become another island. Rezics Wiki connects to story identity, Zone, Realm, Tags, and Review so knowledge remains where it is used.

sections.title: Knowledge is more than a page.
sections.body: Rezics keeps structured data and free writing together, so knowledge can be read, searched, cited, compared, and reused.

products.name: Rezics Shelf
products.summary: Personal and community curation paths that make discovery understandable instead of black-boxed.
features: Collect stories, reviews, wiki pages, zones, and other shelf items
Use explainable curation instead of pure algorithmic recommendation
Let readers, communities, and creators build discovery entrances

detail.heading: Curation is a form of understanding
detail.lead: Rezics Shelf is more than a saved list. It lets readers and communities build reading paths, topic entrances, and recommendation context so the next story can be encountered better.

sections.title: A shelf can carry judgment, not only storage.
sections.body: A Shelf can collect works, reviews, wiki pages, zones, or other shelves, then explain why these things should be seen together.

sections.title: Discovery should not be handed entirely to a black box.
sections.body: Rezics lets people see how communities and curators organize stories, making recommendations explainable, discussable, and more trustworthy.

sections.title: Everyone can leave a path through stories.
sections.body: Shelf turns personal taste, community consensus, and topic curation into shareable entrances that help others find fitting stories.

products.name: Rezics Progress
products.summary: Track reading, watching, playing, and following across platforms.
features: Record personal progress beyond any single platform
Support reading, watching, playing, and hybrid story experiences
Connect personal journey to reviews, shelves, zones, and discovery paths

detail.heading: Record the path you walked with stories
detail.lead: Rezics Progress keeps personal journeys from being split by platforms. Reading, watching, playing, and following a story in different places should still return to one identity.

sections.title: Progress should not belong to one app.
sections.body: When a story moves across origin sites, translations, editions, and adaptations, personal progress needs to continue across those boundaries.

sections.title: Story experience is not only reading.
sections.body: Rezics Progress is built for novels, interactive fiction, games, video, and hybrid works, so different story journeys can be recorded.

sections.title: Progress becomes a base for later understanding and sharing.
sections.body: Progress can connect to reviews, shelves, and zones, helping you return not only to what you experienced, but to how you understood it.
